name: atlas
description:
/atlas — wraps `hexa atlas` (the atlas SSOT surface, PR-only landing per @D g_atlas_binary_builtin). Read verbs: hash · stats [--audit [--scope=rodata|overlay|merged] [--format=json]] · lookup [K] · lookup --prefix=

· dump [K] [--json] — all resolve against the compile-time embedded static_atlas() (zero fs read, zero parse, ~6594 P/C/L nodes). Write verbs: append-witness --kind --id {--raw | --stdin} (record a node as `atlas.append.witness--.n6` staging shard, picked up by merger.hexa::_discover on next regen) · register --from-{verify,drill,check} [--auto-pr] (multi-verb DIRECT in-memory node-gen — every `--from-` arm runs the verb in-process, builds an AtlasNode struct-literal IN MEMORY, folds directly into compiler/atlas/embedded.gen.hexa via the canonical DiscoveryEvent → register_from_event sink — no .n6 shard, no markdown intermediate; honest degrade — drill with verdict=skip opens NO PR, verify FALSIFIED rejects; with --auto-pr — branch + commit + `gh || api` PR, NEVER claims a PR opened unless `gh` rc=0 or HTTP 201) · pr --staging (the sole landing verb under PR-only policy — fold the shard onto a fresh branch, commit, `gh pr create`; direct fold-to-live is forbidden). NL trigger via skill ('atlas lookup', 'atlas stats', '아틀라스 조회', '아틀라스 등록', 'register from drill', 'atlas absorb').
